name: Elote Con Crema (Fresh Corn with Cream, Chiles, & Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Melt butter in a pan. Cook onion and garlic until softened.
Add roasted poblano chiles; cook covered for 8 minutes.
Stir in corn, cheese, and salt. Cover tightly with foil or lid.
Bake frozen corn for 20 minutes; fresh corn for 40 minutes, stirring to incorporate cheese after the first 20 minutes.
Serve hot with sour cream.
